texto: Love is such a cruel thing. One minute you've been texting them for hours, hoping he'll ask you ask on a date, or just telling you how he feels about you. Next minute, he's saying the stupid, "No it's me not you. We can just be friends." While I'm crying my eyes out hoping you may take me back. Cause I don't want to be friends.
explicacao: Citação de Felisha Rush sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Love is such a cruel thing. One minute you've been texting them for hours, hoping he'll ask you a…” articula amor, heartbreak, reflexao em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

texto: Falling is not hard to do just take your feet from under you but do you want to risk something that could hurt you, life is like that choose to fall and fall choose success and acomplish
